title: Efficacy and safety of retatrutide, a GIP, GLP-1, and glucagon receptor agonist, in adults with type 2 diabetes (TRANSCEND-T2D-1): a double-blind, randomised, phase 3 trial
population: 537 adults with type 2 diabetes inadequately controlled with diet and exercise
intervention: once-weekly retatrutide 4 mg, 9 mg or 12 mg
key_results: All studied doses improved glycaemic control and reduced bodyweight compared with placebo.
safety_findings: Gastrointestinal adverse events remained the most common tolerability findings.
limitations: Longer-term cardiovascular, renal and population-specific outcomes require dedicated trials.
investigational_status_notice: Retatrutide remains investigational and is not approved for public use.
